name: Do I need lawyer for simple work sprain in Riverton Utah?

mainEntity.name: Do I need lawyer for simple work sprain in Riverton Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: For simple, maybe not; for disputes, yes—contingency fee[4].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Not always for minor, but yes if denied, complex, or third-party.** Lawyers work contingency, no upfront cost[4]. **Key factors:** Insurers lowball; experience handles appeals. **Practical guidance:** Try self-file first, hire if issues arise. Free consults common. **Expert help boosts settlements 2-3x.**
